title: KoddiUD ExtraBold High Readability Font
description: Korean High Readability Font made by Korea Disabled people's Development Institude
body:
this resource pack aims to help low-vision by providing high readability font. while the font is made for low vision, it does not look visually unattractive nor inconvenient.
supports Korean Hangul, English Alphabet.

Caxton is required to use pack file with **c** suffix.

the original font made by [Korean Disabled people's Development Institude](https://www.koddi.or.kr/ud/sub1_2).
